arguments.argument:
event_inherited() image_speed=0.33
//Enemy base statistics eName="Fake Metroid" eLevel=10 maxLife=35 life=maxLife pointWorth=10 atkPower=5 stunResist=1 baseItemChance=20 baseDropIndex=50 dieEffect=0
currHspd=0 currVspd=0
deathAnim=0
jeremyText="The behavior for these is simple, but it can be annoying due to its high speed. It tries to track you, but it has momentum in its movement." chaoText="This thing looks kinda like a Metroid... oh, whoops, maybe I should look at what the program labeled it as." devText="This thing is in the game because I wanted an enemy that could swarm easy, but could also be destroyed easy."
